artifacts.purpose: Canonical agent guidance: Prime Invariants, mission, universal and repo-specific invariants, Bootstrap Handoff, Session Startup, Active Sources, Source of Truth, Operator Requests, verification, git safety, final response
Thin Claude Code shim that @imports AGENTS.md so the harness (and the re-ground hook) reach the canonical guidance and Prime Invariants
Current repo state, active work, blockers, next actions, verification commands, and unrecorded repo memory
Live durable decisions (Active) and the Open Decisions queue; closed entries are archived to docs/history/decisions-archive.md
Verification commands and policy, fact-bearing paths, guidance paths, project notes
Inventory of the durable guidance artifacts with custody evidence from git at time of bootstrap
Provenance log of closed (Adopted/Superseded) decisions, moved verbatim out of the live decisions doc
Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the catchup operator in AGENTS.md

Claude Code slash-command wrapper pointing at the playbook operator in AGENTS.md

Machine-local Claude Code settings; intentionally not committed
